item_demigodrunestone_description: Can you withstand the power within?
item_infusedbeltstrength_description: Gives the wearer the strength and energy of the gods.
item_infusedbeltstrength_tooltip:
Increase max carry weight and energy.
Max carry weight: <color=orange>+{0}</color>
Max energy: <color=orange>+{1}</color>
item_infusedancientseed_description:
The source of life...

Consume this to awake the <color=orange>true power</color> of your abilities.

Can only be consumed by <color=orange>Freyja</color>.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedbones_description:
In the shadows you walk.

Consume this to awake the <color=orange>true power</color> of your abilities.

Can only be consumed by <color=orange>Hel</color>.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedclaws_description:
Fenring is your flesh, and its flesh is yours.

Consume this to awake the <color=orange>true power</color> of your abilities.

Can only be consumed by <color=orange>Fenrir</color>.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedfeathers_description:
His kin is now yours...

Consume this to awake the <color=orange>true power</color> of your abilities.

Can only be consumed by <color=orange>Ullr</color>.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedhammer_description:
Can Iron Sledge be more than just a hammer?

Consume this to awake the <color=orange>true power</color> of your abilities.

Can only be consumed by <color=orange>Thor</color>.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedsurtling_description:
Sutrling is your soul, and its soul is yours.

Consume this to awake the <color=orange>true power</color> of your abilities.

Can only be consumed by <color=orange>Surtr</color>.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedchitin_description:
Consume this to increase the <color=orange>block armor</color> of your <color=orange>shields</color> or <color=orange>titan arms</color>.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedeitr_description:
Can you withstand all this energy?

Consume this to increase your <color=orange>base eitr</color> and <color=orange>regeneration speed</color> per unspent energy point.

Can only be <color=orange>consumed once</color>.
item_infusedleatherscraps_description:
Consume this to decrease the <color=orange>time</color> taken to passively <color=orange>regenerate</color> one <color=orange>energy</color> point.

Can be <color=orange>consumed multiple times</color>.
item_sweetfish_description: Raw fish... the food of the gods. The honey will give you eitr, and hopefully help you digesting...
item_sweetfishwithcarrot_description: Raw fish... the food of the gods. The honey will give you eitr, and the carrot some stamina.
item_sweetfishwithturnip_description: Raw fish... the food of the gods. The honey will give you eitr, and the turnip extra stamina.
item_sweetfishwithonion_description: Raw fish... the food of the gods. The honey will give you eitr, and the onion tons of stamina.
item_sweetsushi_description: Raw fish... the food of the gods. Could this be any better than in the form of sushi?
item_sweetshrimp_description: Raw fish... the food of the gods. The gods hope you are not allergic to shrimps...
